companyInvites.title: Company Invites
companyInvites.description: Create human invite links for company access. New invite links are copied to your clipboard when they are generated.

createInvite.title: Create invite
createInvite.description: Generate a human invite link and choose the default access it should request.
createInvite.singleUseNote: Each invite link is single-use. The first successful use consumes the link and creates or reuses the matching join request before approval.
createInvite.historyNote: Invite history below keeps the audit trail.

viewer.label: Viewer
viewer.description: Can view company work and follow along without operational permissions.

operator.label: Operator
operator.description: Recommended for people who need to help run work without managing access.

admin.label: Admin
admin.description: Recommended for operators who need to invite people, create agents, and approve joins.
admin.gets: Can create agents, invite users, assign tasks, and approve join requests.

owner.label: Owner
owner.description: Full company access, including membership and permission management.
owner.gets: Everything in Admin, plus managing members and permission grants.

latestInvite.title: Latest invite link
latestInvite.domainNote: This URL includes the current Paperclip domain returned by the server.

history.title: Invite history
history.description: Review invite status, role, inviter, and any linked join request.
history.empty: No invites have been created for this company yet.

companyInvites.selectCompany: Select a company to manage invites.
companyInvites.permissionError: You do not have permission to manage company invites.

toast.clipboardUnavailableBody: Copy the invite URL manually from the field below.
toast.inviteCreatedCopied: Invite ready below and copied to clipboard.

notAvailable.title: Invite not available
notAvailable.description: This invite may be expired, revoked, or already used.

landing.rejected: This join request was not approved.
landing.alreadyUsed: This invite has already been used.

awaitingApproval.title: Request to join {{companyName}}
awaitingApproval.body: Your request is still awaiting approval. {{approver}} must approve your request to join.
awaitingApproval.askToVisit: Ask them to visit {{link}} to approve your request.
awaitingApproval.refreshHint: Refresh this page after you've been approved — you'll be redirected automatically.

landing.invitedToJoin: You've been invited to join Paperclip
landing.agentFormDescription: Review the invite details, then submit the agent information below to start the join request.
landing.humanAccountDescription: Create your Paperclip account first. If you already have one, switch to sign in and continue the invite with the same email.
landing.readyDescription: Your account is ready. Review the invite details, then accept it to continue.

agentForm.title: Submit agent details
agentForm.description: This invite will create an approval request for a new agent in {{companyName}}.

auth.createAccountDescription: Start with a Paperclip account. After that, you'll come right back here to accept the invite for {{companyName}}.
auth.signInDescription: Use the Paperclip account that already matches this invite. If you do not have one yet, switch back to create account.
auth.name: Name
auth.alreadySignedUpHint: Already signed up before? Use the existing-account option instead so the invite lands on the right Paperclip user.
auth.noAccountHint: No account yet? Switch back to create account so you can accept the invite with a new login.
auth.fillRequiredFields: Please fill in all required fields.

accept.submitCompleteJoinRequest: submit or complete your join request for {{companyName}}

errors.checkingAccess: Checking your company access. Try again in a moment.
errors.alreadyBelongs: This account already belongs to the company.
errors.userAlreadyExists: An account already exists for {{email}}. Sign in below to continue with this invite.
errors.invalidEmailOrPassword: That email and password did not match an existing Paperclip account. Check both fields, or create an account first if you are new here.
errors.accountMayExist: An account may already exist for {{email}}. Try signing in instead.

uxLab.title: Invite and signup UX review surface
uxLab.description: This page collects the current invite landing, signup, approval-result, and company invite-management states in one place so styling changes can be reviewed without recreating each backend condition by hand.

coveredStates.title: Covered states
items: Invite loading, access-check, missing-token, and unavailable states
Inline account creation and sign-in variants, including feedback/error copy
Human accept, agent request, and auto-accept transitions
Pending approval, joined-now, claim secret, and onboarding result screens
Company invite creation, copied-link, history, empty, and permission-error states

topLevelStates.title: Landing state coverage
topLevelStates.description: Small cards for the fast-return invite states that do not render the full split-screen layout.

loadingInvite.title: Loading invite
loadingInvite.body: Shown while invite summary, deployment mode, or auth session data is still loading.

checkingAccess.title: Checking your access
checkingAccess.body: Shown after sign-in while the app verifies whether the current user already belongs to the invited company.

invalidToken.title: Invalid invite token
invalidToken.body: The token is missing entirely, so the page short-circuits before any invite lookup.

notAvailable.title: Invite not available
notAvailable.body: Used for expired, revoked, already-consumed, or otherwise missing invites.

bootstrapComplete.title: Bootstrap complete
bootstrapComplete.body: Result screen for bootstrap CEO invites after setup has been accepted successfully.

autoAccept.title: Auto-accept in progress
autoAccept.body: Signed-in human users skip the extra button click and move straight into join submission.

alreadyMember.title: Already a member
alreadyMember.body: Acceptance stays disabled and the page redirects into the company once membership is confirmed.

resultSurfaces.title: Invite result surfaces
resultSurfaces.body: Both pending-approval and joined-now confirmations are included below with claim and onboarding extras.

inviteLanding.title: Split-screen invite flows
inviteLanding.description: These frames mirror the production invite surface closely enough to review spacing, hierarchy, and control states while keeping data fixture-driven.

resultStates.title: Approval and completion screens
resultStates.description: These are the post-submit states returned from invite acceptance, including optional claim and onboarding metadata.

standaloneAuth.title: Auth page states
standaloneAuth.description: The general `/auth` page uses a different composition from invite landing. These previews keep both sign-in and sign-up variants visible.

authPreview.title: Side-by-side signup styling review
authPreview.description: This frame mirrors the production auth surface so spacing, label density, button treatments, and desktop composition are easy to compare.

companySettings.title: Company invite management
companySettings.description: This section captures the board-side invite creation flow, copied-link state, audit table, and the edge states that are otherwise tedious to stage.

companyInvitesPreview.title: Company Invites
companyInvitesPreview.createInviteDescription: Generate a human invite link and choose the default access it should request.
companyInvitesPreview.singleUseNote: Each invite link is single-use. The first successful use consumes the link and creates or reuses the matching join request before approval.
companyInvitesPreview.historyNote: Invite history below keeps the audit trail.
companyInvitesPreview.domainNote: This URL includes the current Paperclip domain returned by the server.
companyInvitesPreview.historyDescription: Review invite status, role, inviter, and any linked join request.
companyInvitesPreview.emptyHistoryDescription: No invites have been created for this company yet.
companyInvitesPreview.permissionErrorDescription: You do not have permission to manage company invites.

inviteSummary.invitedToJoin: You've been invited to join Paperclip
inviteSummary.createAccountDescription: Create your Paperclip account first. If you already have one, switch to sign in and continue the invite with the same email.
inviteSummary.readyDescription: Your account is ready. Review the invite details, then accept it to continue.
inviteSummary.reviewAgentDescription: Review the invite details, then submit the agent information below to start the join request.

inlineAuth.createAccountDescription: Start with a Paperclip account. After that, you'll come right back here to accept the invite for {{companyName}}.
inlineAuth.signInDescription: Use the Paperclip account that already matches this invite. If you do not have one yet, switch back to create account.
inlineAuth.name: Name
inlineAuth.alreadySignedUpHint: Already signed up before? Use the existing-account option instead so the invite lands on the right Paperclip user.
inlineAuth.noAccountHint: No account yet? Switch back to create account so you can accept the invite with a new login.

agentRequest.title: Submit agent details
agentRequest.description: This invite will create an approval request for a new agent in {{companyName}}.

acceptInvite.title: Accept company invite
acceptInvite.submitOrCompleteDescription: This will submit or complete your join request for {{companyName}}.

inviteResult.approverMustApprove: {{inviter}} must approve your request to join.
inviteResult.askToVisit: Ask them to visit Company Settings → Access to approve your request.
inviteResult.joinedNowDescription: Your account already matched the approved invite, so the board can be opened immediately.
inviteResult.refreshHint: Refresh this page after you've been approved — you'll be redirected automatically.

authScreen.signInDescription: Use your email and password to access this instance.
authScreen.signUpDescription: Create an account for this instance. Email confirmation is not required in v1.
authScreen.name: Name

joinRequestQueue.title: Join Request Queue
joinRequestQueue.description: Review human and agent join requests outside the mixed inbox feed. This queue uses the same approval mutations as the inline inbox cards.
joinRequestQueue.noMatches: No join requests match the current filters.
joinRequestQueue.selectCompany: Select a company to review join requests.
joinRequestQueue.permissionError: You do not have permission to review join requests for this company.
